reachability_artifacts: built sworn notifications webhook set/status/preview/off/remove sequence in an isolated home with filesystem hashes and a network sentinel
built loop fixture delivering the previewed safe payload to a real local HTTP server while excluded canaries remain absent and a delivery failure leaves the verdict unchanged

open_deferrals.item: Durable notification outbox, replay, mobile delivery, and delivery history
open_deferrals.why: This safety release owns consent, secret storage, projection, and the bounded adapter; durable operation events and outbox transaction ordering depend on the autonomous control core and must not be duplicated here.
open_deferrals.tracking: sworn#109; docs/release/2026-07-14-autonomous-operations/S07-notification-outbox and S08-webhook-mobile-delivery require replanning against C-05 and C-06
open_deferrals.acknowledgement: The Coach was told during 2026-07-15 planning that durability, mobile delivery, and replay remain in #109 and ratified this boundary.

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; the implementer must confirm the adapter seam and every current notification producer before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent user can use account identity without losing provider credentials, changing model routes, purchasing managed inference, or generating unapproved outbound traffic.

positive_scenarios: A user explicitly configures a webhook, previews its safe payload, and can inspect or disable it without logging in.
An existing explicitly configured webhook migrates without touching provider or account secrets.
negative_scenarios: Login alone cannot enable email, webhook, or another outbound channel.
A webhook cannot receive paths, credentials, payloads, free-form diagnostics, or mutation instructions.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Independent consent and a previewable safe payload preserve useful generic paging without making account identity an outbound-data decision.

design_decisions.choice: Store notification destinations in versioned notifications.json and move configuration to sworn notifications.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified 2026-07-15: independent 0600 notifications.json, top-level webhook gestures, explicit enablement, redacted status, and no-send preview.
design_decisions.rationale: Destinations are neither account identity nor provider credentials and require their own consent lifecycle.

design_decisions.choice: Keep the interim adapter transport-independent and leave durability to #109.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified 2026-07-15 as part of the release decomposition: this slice owns safe configuration/projection; #109 retains outbox, replay, mobile, and WebUI delivery health.
design_decisions.rationale: The safety contract can land without duplicating the autonomous command/event engine.
